stemHtml: What is the approximate maximum distance and height that turbulence caused by mountain waves may be encountered on the leeward side of the Rocky Mountains in the USA?

options.a: 600 NM and up to the tropopause.
options.b: 500 NM and in the shadow of the mountain range below ridge height.
options.c: 10 NM and up to 1500 ft above the mountains.
options.d: 50 NM and up to 500 ft above the mountains.
